name: Trusted Credentials, Untrusted Behavior: Benchmarking LLM-Agent Security in High-Performance Computing

description: arXiv:2607.18485v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Large language model (LLM) agents are starting to take on routine work in high-performance computing (HPC), including monitoring Slurm jobs, diagnosing failed builds, inspecting simulation output, and coordinating scientific workflows. To do this work, an agent commonly acts under its user's credentials and inherits the user's access to files an...
author: Jie Li
